title: tylophora albiflora
intro: Tylophora albiflora, also known as White-gloved milkwort, is a species of flowering plant in the Apocynaceae family. It is an herb that has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimalarial activities. The health benefits of Tylophora albiflora include its ability to relieve respiratory issues such as asthma and bronchitis, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of malaria. Tylophora albiflora can be prepared into herbal remedies such as decoctions, infusions, and powder, which are used to treat various health conditions.
